name: Chicken with Rice (Arroz Con Pollo)
recipeIngredient: 6 large Ripe tomatoes, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour oil into a large heavy frying pan and heat to medium-high temperature.
2. Add the chicken pieces and sprinkle with salt. Fry in batches if needed.
3. Brown each piece and transfer to a large baking dish.
4. In the same oil, brown the chorizo links and remove them to the baking dish, spacing between the chicken pieces.
5. Add half the rice in an even layer over the chicken and sausage.
6. In the same fat, sauté garlic, onion, and bell pepper until they are limp.
7. Distribute the vegetables evenly over the top of the chicken, sausage, and rice.
8. Spoon the remaining rice over the top.
9. Add saffron to the chicken stock and mix well. Pour over the rice.
10. Add chopped tomatoes.
11. Cover tightly and bake at 350°F for 1½ hours. Do not peek!
12. Meanwhile, slightly cook green peas with a pinch of baking soda and keep warm in the pan.
13. Check that the rice is fluffy and the chicken pieces are well done. If necessary, bake for a little longer.
14. For serving, transfer to another dish if desired and garnish with drained green peas and pimento strips.
